title: Cucumber Tea Sandwiches
ingredients: 1 loaf soft white bread, slightly flattened and cut into rounds
1 English cucumber, peeled, scored with a fork on the outside and sliced into thin slices
instructions: Place cucumber slices in pie plate and cover with seasoned rice wine vinegar.
Marinate for at least 20 minutes and up to 2 hours in the refrigerator to keep crisp.
Drain cucumber slices well and pat dry before placing on bread.
Place cream cheese, lemon juice, heavy cream, herbs and seasonings in bowl and blend well.
Spread cream cheese mixture on cut out bread rounds.
Top each round with marinated cucumber slice, radish slice, and small sprig of parsley.
Serve within an hour of assembling so bread does not get mushy.
notes: This recipe has been made for multiple tea parties, baby showers, and bridal showers.
If you prefer a sweeter marinade for the cucumbers, heat white wine vinegar with sugar, cool the mixture, then add the cucumbers.
Serve within an hour of assembling to prevent bread from becoming mushy.
